name: Universal Summarizer
description: Smart summarization assistant supporting 8 input types: audio, video, PDF, images, web pages, and text. Auto-transcribes, recognizes scenes, generates structured Markdown reports, and exports mind maps as PNG.
headline: Summarize audio, video, PDFs, images, and web pages into structured reports
author: xiaolu7586

fields.label: Transcription API Key
fields.description: OpenAI-compatible API Key for audio/video transcription (supports Whisper). Only required for audio/video content. Leave blank if using an OpenClaw-compatible platform.

fields.label: Transcription API Base URL
fields.description: Transcription API endpoint. Leave blank to use OpenAI by default. Fill in if using a compatible third-party service.

suggested_prompts: Summarize this YouTube video for me
Extract key points from this PDF and create a mind map
Transcribe this audio file and generate a structured report
Summarize this web page into bullet points
